name: lookup
description: Lookup a user's Discord and Roblox info, and their server moderation history

name: staff-note
description: Add a staff-only note to a Discord or Roblox user

options.name: roblox_user
options.description: The Roblox username to attach this note to

options.name: discord_user
options.description: The Discord user to attach this note to

name: servers
description: View and manage live Roblox servers

options.name: search
options.description: Optional Roblox username, Roblox user ID, or server JobId

name: update
description: Update your linked Roblox profile and roles

options.name: user
options.description: The Discord user to refresh verification data for

name: ping
description: Check the bot response time and connection status

name: setup
description: Initializes Ro-Link for this server (Owner Only)

name: help
description: Show info and list of available commands

name: verify
description: Link your Roblox account with Ro-Link

name: report
description: Submit a report against a player for rule violations
